title: Wrap order lines behind a slice API
scenario: A collection wrapper can own a Vec while keeping later invariants and iteration APIs under one type.
instructions: Define OrderLines with a private Vec<OrderLine>, a constructor, len, is_empty, and as_slice so callers can inspect lines without taking ownership of the Vec.

files.content: // TODO: wrap order lines in an API-owned collection type.

hints.body: Keep the Vec private so the wrapper can protect future invariants.
Return a slice for read-only access instead of cloning or exposing the Vec.
Add as_slice alongside len and is_empty.

completionExplanation: OrderLines now owns its representation while exposing a cheap borrowed view for callers.
